{{Infobox madra
| name = Endless Sword madra
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is fighting with [[Endless Sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s tent contains slowly cycling [[Endless Sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses [[Endless Sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
